title: Autotel EventCatalog Drift Summary v0.1.0
description: Machine-readable summary written by `autotel-eventcatalog drift --summary-output`. Downstream tooling (GitHub Actions, dashboards, Slack bots) should read this. Major-version bumps are breaking; minor-version bumps add optional fields only.

mode.description: Which policy was applied. `all` = fail on any drift; `new-only` = fail only on drift introduced vs a baseline snapshot.

shouldFail.description: True iff the configured policy considers the current state a CI failure.

reason.description: Short human-readable line explaining why shouldFail is what it is.

total.description: Sum of all individual drift findings. Matches the dashboard's `drift findings` badge.

fieldDriftEvents.description: Distinct events with at least one field-path mismatch.

fieldDriftPaths.description: Sum of extra + missing field paths across every event with field drift.
